seo.title: Product Catalog
seo.description: Industrial smart equipment, modular hardware, and energy system building blocks for B2B programs. Demo content for the technical-product-showcase theme.

sections.title: Hardware built for integration, not one-off hero builds.
sections.description: Explore the product lines that ship with documentation, traceability, and a repeatable configuration path for integrators.
sections.imageAlt: Stacked modular enclosures on a factory pallet

items.title: Smart equipment
items.description: Machine intelligence at the edge: sensing, PLC integration, telemetry, and operator-safe diagnostics pathways.

items.title: Industrial automation
items.description: Turnkey automation assemblies that reduce wiring time while keeping deterministic cycle performance.

items.title: Energy systems
items.description: Storage, inverter, and ancillary components sized for tariff-driven optimisation and outage resilience targets.

sections.title: What buyers routinely validate
sections.description: These are checklist items procurement teams evaluate before awarding an equipment program.

items.title: Environmental envelope
items.description: Documented ingress, temperature ranges, EMI profiles, and derating curves for predictable site fit.

items.title: Cyber posture
items.description: Hardened device roles, segmented networks, audit logs, and an agreed patch cadence for industrial networks.

items.title: Manufacturing lineage
items.description: Serial-level traceability, inspection records, and change control notices per hardware revision.

sections.title: Energy integration building blocks
sections.description: Energy equipment is staged as repeatable blocks: metering, inversion, storage, DC distribution, protection, communication. Buyers pick the watt-hour target and interconnect class; delivery follows a repeatable cabinet template.
sections.imageAlt: Industrial energy equipment cabinets with conduit runs

items.title: Industrial technology refresh programme
items.description: A staged refresh that replaces intermittent legacy machines with repeatable cells that share tooling, IO, documentation, and spares economics.

items.title: Regional microgrid rollout
items.description: Behind-the-meter storage plus inverter stacking at facilities that need outage tolerance without expanding grid import capacity.
